original_prompt: still when i click delete report in teh saved assets section theya re not deleted
rephrased_goal: Force the delete button in saved reports to work by using absolute explicit event listeners and massive logging.

tasks.description: Do-Pebble: Rewrite ReportingView saved reports logic to use direct listeners and more visual feedback
subtasks_required: 1.1 Remove delegation and use direct listeners on each item (brute force)
1.2 Add explicit error alerts for every stage of the delete process
1.3 Ensure IDs are correctly passed and logged

tasks.description: Check-Pebble: Verify build and perform boss sweep

subtasks_required: Ensure no stale listeners remain from previous views
